turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I had been seeing a therapist online and two weeks ago he was really mean, but said he thought it was a good session and we were making a breakthrough. Then when I signed on last week I signed in to request entrance into the meeting and after a few moments was told it was denied. Nothing like feeling the person who is paid to help you refusing to talk to you

results.term: I feel like he didn't help at all. Up to that poin...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I feel like he didn't help at all. Up to that point we mostly just talked about politics or whatever. I'm a charity patient, he get's paid through the organization, but because of my financial difficulties, I'm not paying. I think he saw that as a shortcoming on my part.

results.term: I'm not sure I can find another who I don't have t...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I'm not sure I can find another who I don't have to pay. My insurance has a $20 copay and if I had to pay that I wouldn't be able to buy groceries. This came through my religious organization and he was the only one available in my area. I guess I just have to find another way to cope

results.term: I'm on Medicare and supplemental insurance. I didn...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I'm on Medicare and supplemental insurance. I didn't know you can, possibly, see one for free. I'll look into that. That is helpful.

results.term: I asked him to help me with some but all he would ...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I asked him to help me with some but all he would say is that I should stop vaping (I switched from smoking some years ago). I told him it feels like I'm walking a tightrope and he's suggesting I get rid of the safety net without giving me something else, some other way to cope. He said that's not what a therapist is supposed to do and that my resistance shows I don't really want to change.

results.term: I asked him about meditation and if he could recom...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I asked him about meditation and if he could recommend something. He wouldn't. I have only been able to do it successfully once, at the meditation gardens when I visited my son in San Diego some years back. Since I can't always get to that kind of natural setting, I was hoping he could give me some resources. Do you know of any place I can find some?
